reviews.comment:
Compre 1300 pesos de bencina el día lunes 17/02/20 y pase 2 veces la tarjeta débito sin poder pagar según ellos.  Pagué en efectivo pesos chilenos.  Correspondía algo así como 17 mil pesos y el vendedor me dijo que me cobraba 22 mil porque así pagaban ellos la conversión.  Hoy me doy cuenta que sale duplicado el valor en mi tarjeta.  Es decir, se pagó 2 veces con la tarjeta y más encima pague en efectivo y con intereses.  Quien sabe como hacer la denuncia para el reverso del cobro?

(Translated by Google)
I bought 1300 pesos worth of gasoline on Monday, February 17, 2020, and my debit card was swiped twice, but they said it wouldn't pay. I ended up paying in Chilean pesos in cash. The amount should have been around 17,000 pesos, but the cashier told me he was charging me 22,000 because that's how much they had to pay for the conversion. Today I realized the charge is showing up twice on my card statement. In other words, it was paid twice with the card, and on top of that, I paid in cash and was charged interest. Does anyone know how to file a complaint to get a refund?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzbjkzWUVREAE

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio muy prolija con baños muy limpios, en el bar podes comer y tomar algo con una buena variedad de opciones dependiendo la temporada y teniendo en cuenta que es una estación de servicio.
Los playeros son muy atentos y cómo es lógico en temporada alta hay demoras para cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
A very tidy gas station with very clean restrooms. At the bar, you can eat and drink something, with a good variety of options depending on the season, considering it's a gas station.
The attendants are very attentive, and as is understandable during peak season, there are delays in refueling.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzbGNxTTlRRRAB
